song.title: I Am Praying for You
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I have a Savior, He’s pleading in glory, A dear, loving Savior, Though earth-friends be few;|| And now He is watching In tenderness o’er me, And, oh, that my Savior Were your Savior too!
[C] Chorus For you I am praying, For you I am praying, For you I am praying, I’m praying for you.
[V2] 2) I have a Father; To me He has given A hope for eternity, Blessed and true;|| And soon He will call me To meet Him in heaven, But, oh, that He’d let me Bring you with me too!
[V3] 3) I have a peace; It is calm as a river, A peace that the friends Of this world never knew;|| My Savior alone is Its author and giver, And, oh, could I know It was given for you!
[V4] 4) When He has found you, Tell others the story, That my loving Savior Is your Savior, too;|| Then pray that your Savior May bring them to glory, And prayer will be answered— ’Twas answered for you!
song.author: Samuel O'Malley Cluff
